name: Professional Market Research Palette
description: Professional color scheme for MBB-grade presentations. Avoids AI slop patterns (no purple gradients, no #6366f1).

blue.usage: Data visualization, section headers, links, professional emphasis

green.usage: Success states, positive metrics, growth indicators

medium.usage: Secondary text, captions, less emphasized content

charts.description: Use in order for multi-series charts. Avoid using all at once if possible.

antiPatterns.reasoning: Purple gradients and Tailwind default purples are overused in AI-generated designs. Use professional blues and earth tones instead.

hierarchy: Use primary dark (#141413) for main headings
Use text dark (#2C2C2C) for body content
Use text light (#8A8A8A) for footers and metadata
emphasis: Highlight boxes with colored left border (not full background)
balance: Avoid rainbow effects - limit to 2-3 colors per slide
professionalism: Asymmetric layouts preferred over perfect symmetry
White space is professional - don't fill every pixel

recommendations: Always use dark text (#141413 or #2C2C2C) on light backgrounds
Use white text on dark/accent backgrounds
Test readability at presentation distance (not just screen)

pptx_specific.note: When using with document-skills/pptx html2pptx workflow
pptx_specific.css_format: Use hex without # prefix in PptxGenJS calls to avoid file corruption
